news.title:
GAIL plans to borrow ₹5,000-₹6,000 cr in FY27 to fund expansion.
Dabhol terminal operates at 2.25M tpy due to global LNG supply constraints.
news.summary:

news.title:
GAIL India's Ratnagiri LNG terminal to operate at 2.25 MTPA out of 5 MTPA capacity.

news.title:
Brokerages highlight stock picks like BPCL, GAIL, Tata Steel, SBI Life, and Ambuja Cement across energy, cement, and insurance sectors.
Analysts favor 360One, Nuvama Wealth, Max Healthcare, and domestic cyclicals, citing resilience, market recovery potential, and strategic positioning.

news.title:
GAIL India plans to borrow ₹50-60B in FY27, targeting local markets.
Raising debt in dollars deemed expensive; focus remains on rupee funding.

news.title:
Experts discussed buy, sell, or hold recommendations for stocks like IOC, IndiGo, GE Shipping, Gail, and more on NDTV Profit.
IOC and Gail were advised as long-term holds; IndiGo faced resistance near Rs 4,900-5,000, and MTAR as 'wait and watch.'

news.title:
GAIL shares jumped 7.6%, hitting ₹156.5 on NSE, after US-Iran ceasefire news.
GAIL rebounded 16% from 52-week low but remains 23% below 52-week high of ₹202.79.
news.summary:
GAIL shares jumped 7.6%, hitting ₹156.5 on NSE, after US-Iran ceasefire news.
GAIL rebounded 16% from 52-week low but remains 23% below 52-week high of ₹202.79.

news.title:
Asian markets surged up to 5% after a 15-day ceasefire between Iran and the US; Gift Nifty jumped 700 points.
Infosys, GAIL, and Aurobindo Pharma among stocks in focus; oil prices plunged ~14% amid eased geopolitical risks.
news.summary:
Asian markets surged up to 5% after a 15-day ceasefire between Iran and the US; Gift Nifty jumped 700 points.
Infosys, GAIL, and Aurobindo Pharma among stocks in focus; oil prices plunged ~14% amid eased geopolitical risks.

news.title:
GAIL surged after signing a long-term charter agreement with Alpha Gas' affiliate.
Q3 FY26 saw GAIL's net profit drop 19.5% to Rs 1,602.6 cr; sales fell 2.5%.
news.summary:

news.title:
